metadata.title: 4o4 — Startup software development | Web & mobile apps (Amman)
metadata.description: 4o4 is a Jordan-based startup software team (since 2025) building custom web applications, mobile apps, and workflow automation for founders and companies across MENA.
metadata.keywords: startup software development, custom web applications, mobile app development, MVP, web apps, Jordan software company, Amman developers, MENA tech, workflow automation, n8n, UI UX, cloud deployment, ASP.NET, React, React Native
metadata.openGraphTitle: 4o4 — Custom web & mobile software from Jordan
metadata.openGraphDescription: Ship reliable web apps, mobile apps, and automation with a focused team. Serving startups and growing businesses in Jordan and MENA since 2025.
metadata.twitterDescription: Custom web applications, mobile apps, and automation for teams in MENA.

jsonLd.organizationDescription: Startup software development team in Amman, Jordan—custom web applications, mobile apps, and workflow automation for MENA.

projects.intro: A selection from {count} shipped builds—marketplaces, internal tools, mobile apps, and automation. Open a card for scope and stack; public links open in a new tab when available.

cashtics.title: Cashtics
cashtics.subtitle: Freelance marketplace
cashtics.description: A task marketplace connecting people who want flexible work with businesses posting short jobs—profiles, escrow-style flows, and an operator dashboard for moderation.
cashtics.result: Growing user base with steady month‑over‑month task volume
cashtics.imageAlt: Cashtics freelance marketplace web app interface preview for 4o4 portfolio

sooquk.title: Sooquk
sooquk.subtitle: Regional e‑commerce
sooquk.description: A Jordan‑focused storefront for fashion and lifestyle sellers—catalog, checkout, and vendor tools with performance tuned for mobile shoppers.
sooquk.result: Live vendors onboarded with stable checkout in production
sooquk.imageAlt: Sooquk e‑commerce marketplace screenshot for Jordan retailers by 4o4

okal.title: Okal for Heroes
okal.subtitle: Kids barber booking
okal.description: Appointment booking and shop operations for a kids’ barber brand—reminders, coupons, ticketing, and a parent‑friendly flow on mobile.
okal.result: Strong early adoption from families in launch neighborhoods
okal.imageAlt: Okal for Heroes barber booking web experience designed by 4o4

breshta.title: Breshta
breshta.subtitle: Loyalty & rewards
breshta.description: Deals, streaks, and notifications to bring shoppers back—daily rewards, birthdays, and lightweight gamification without brittle one‑off scripts.
breshta.result: Engaged returning users through loyalty loops
breshta.imageAlt: Breshta loyalty app concept screen from 4o4 client work

lastonewin.title: LastOneWin
lastonewin.subtitle: Live competition game
lastonewin.description: A real‑time “last finger on screen” competition—rooms, sessions, and resilient sync so spikes during promos don’t ruin the experience.
lastonewin.result: Handled live traffic peaks during campaign windows
lastonewin.imageAlt: LastOneWin real‑time mobile game promotional artwork in 4o4 portfolio

ilern.title: ILern
ilern.subtitle: Learning platform
ilern.description: Courses, enrollments, instructor tools, and certificates—one place for admins, teachers, and students with sensible roles and audit‑friendly data.
ilern.result: Class operations running on a single consolidated stack
ilern.imageAlt: ILern LMS dashboard and course view built by 4o4

clinical.title: Clinical desktop suite
clinical.subtitle: Healthcare back office
clinical.description: Patient records, scheduling, and billing workflows for a clinic team—desktop‑first, keyboard‑friendly screens where accuracy matters more than animation.
clinical.result: Day‑to‑day clinic operations on one reliable database
clinical.imageAlt: Healthcare management desktop UI sample from 4o4 delivery work

about.p1: 4o4 builds custom web applications, mobile apps, and automation for teams that need reliable delivery without enterprise overhead. We started in 2025 with a simple focus: clear scopes, steady communication, and software you can run in production with confidence.
about.p2: Our compact team of designers and engineers works as an extension of yours—whether you are validating an MVP or replacing a fragile spreadsheet with a real system. See
about.p2Contact: tell us what you are building

values.title: Clarity
values.desc: Requirements you can plan around—no mystery scope

values.title: Craft
values.desc: Clean code, thoughtful UX, maintainable releases

values.title: Partnership
values.desc: We work alongside your team, not in a black box

values.title: Momentum
values.desc: Shipping in iterations so you learn and improve fast

services.intro: End‑to‑end support for startups and SMBs: discovery, design, implementation, and launch—with honest timelines and a bias for maintainable software.
services.ctaBody: Book a 30‑minute discovery call—we will map scope, risks, and a sensible first milestone.

list.title: Web development
list.subtitle: Custom web applications
list.description: From marketing sites to internal tools and multi-tenant SaaS—we design APIs, permissions, and frontends you can evolve. MVPs ship with room to grow, not throwaway code.

list.title: Mobile apps
list.subtitle: iOS, Android & cross‑platform
list.description: We build apps where your users already are: native or cross‑platform (e.g. React Native), store-ready builds, and integrations with your existing backend and auth.

list.title: UI / UX design
list.subtitle: Product‑led interfaces
list.description: Interfaces that match how people work—flows, components, and design systems that keep design and engineering aligned from prototype to production.

list.title: Brand & product identity
list.subtitle: Clear positioning
list.description: For startups, brand is how users trust you before the first deploy. We help you define voice, visual basics, and in‑product patterns that stay consistent as you scale.

list.title: Cloud & DevOps
list.subtitle: Right‑sized infrastructure
list.description: We deploy to AWS or Azure with environments, CI/CD, and monitoring suited to your stage—no oversized clusters for day one; room to scale when traffic proves it.

list.title: Workflow automation (n8n)
list.subtitle: Connect your stack
list.description: Replace manual handoffs between CRMs, sheets, and email with reliable n8n workflows—documented, testable, and owned by your team when the integration is live.

testimonials.subtitle: The founders, executives, and teams who've partnered with us to achieve results that matter.

items.quote: I posted my first task on Cashtics and had three offers within two hours. The platform is fast, easy to use, and the payment process felt secure. I've now completed over 40 tasks through it. Never expected this kind of traction so early.
items.author: Khaled Al-Rawi

items.quote: I opened my shop on Sooquk expecting maybe 20–30 visitors a month. Within the first few weeks I was getting hundreds of views. The site loads fast even on mobile, which makes a huge difference for my customers.
items.author: Rima Mansour

items.quote: Booking used to mean phone calls, back-and-forth, and sometimes showing up to a full shop. Now parents just pick a slot and get a reminder before the appointment. The coupon system was a nice touch — our regulars really appreciate it.
items.author: Khalil Okal

items.quote: I open Breshta every morning just to spin the wheel. It sounds simple, but the birthday gift I got last month was a genuinely nice surprise. The deals feel real — not just filler. I've recommended it to at least 10 friends.
items.author: Sara Wahdan

items.quote: I was in a room with over 2,000 players and it didn't lag once. The tension of being one of the last five was actually stressful in the best way. I've played a lot of live games — nothing handles concurrent players this smoothly.
items.author: Faris Nader

items.quote: I finished my certification in six weeks completely online. The course material was well-organized, the instructor portal made it easy to follow my progress, and I never ran into a bug or a broken link. That's rare for an LMS this new.
items.author: Layla Hassan

items.quote: Before this system, our staff was juggling paper files and spreadsheets. Now every patient record is one search away, billing is automatic, and appointment conflicts are a thing of the past. Onboarding took less than a week.
items.author: Dr. Hani Zureikat

process.intro: A transparent four‑phase process—clear milestones, weekly or bi‑weekly demos on most builds, and documentation you can hand to your own team.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We align on goals, users, constraints, and success metrics—so scope, budget, and timeline match what you actually need.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Wireframes and UI that your team can review early—fewer surprises when we implement, faster feedback loops.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Iterative builds with visible progress: APIs, frontends or apps, automated checks, and demos on a cadence you can plan around.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Hardening, deployment, handover, and a short stabilization window—so your team owns the system with confidence.

contact.intro: Share goals, timeline, and budget band—we reply with next steps, usually a short call to align scope. Use the form for async details or book a slot if you already know you want to talk live.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.footnoteMessage: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.footnoteMeeting: Available Sun – Thu, 9 AM – 6 PM (AST). We'll confirm within a few hours.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.blurb: Startup software development from Amman—custom web apps, mobile apps, and workflow automation for teams in Jordan and MENA.
